ItacAcademyItem.Name: Felici (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Founded by Lattanzio Domanino in the convent of the Carmelite Order in Mantua. Domanino obtained official permission to found the academy from Pope Sixtus V on 5 May, 1587. See Sonia Pellizzer, `Domanino, Lattanzio,` in DBI 40 (1991).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
